endpoints.name: GET /events
endpoints.description: Return the upcoming events (e.g. start date >= today). Gets an array of `Event` object. Mandatory query param of **domain** determines the site / country the event belongs to.

endpoints.name: GET /events/{UUID}
endpoints.description: Get one `Event` object by specifying its UUID in the url path.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{UUID}} with a real uuid.

endpoints.name: GET /groups
endpoints.description: Gets an array of `Group` object. Mandatory query param of **domain** determines the site / country the group belongs to.

endpoints.name: GET /groups/{UUID}
endpoints.description: Get one `Group` object by specifying its UUID in the url path.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{UUID}} with a real uuid.

endpoints.name: GET /volunteers
endpoints.description: Gets an array of `Volunteer` object. Mandatory query param of **domain** determines the site / country the volunteers are from.

endpoints.name: GET /volunteers/{UUID}
endpoints.description: Get one specific `Volunteer` object by specifying its UUID in the url path.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{UUID}} with a real uuid.
